modeReason: Roadmap triage agent confirms normal mode. v2.8.0 shipped (Codex CLI + Gemini CLI adapters). Phase 6.75 (Studio Runtime) completed ahead of schedule. Install attribution (v3.0 blocker) shipped in v2.7.x. Go kernel fast-path delegation operational. Security issue #648 (read-only ops) RESOLVED via PR #982. Risk profile steady.

deltaFromPrior.cause: v2.8.0 released (Codex+Gemini CLI). Phase 6.75 DONE. Install attribution shipped. #648 RESOLVED. Security issue count 8->6.

completedPhases.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
completedPhases.note: All 7 roadmap items complete. Default-deny shipped 2026-03-24. PAUSE/ROLLBACK enforced 2026-03-18. Performance benchmark gate operational. Commit scope guard (#22) shipped v2.5.0.

completedPhases.name: Studio Runtime
completedPhases.note: All 3 items shipped ahead of schedule in v2.7.x (PR #987): agentguard init studio wizard, execution profiles (6 total), swarm template schema with zero-dep runtime validator.

activePhases.note: KE-1 and KE-3 complete. KE-2 is the critical path for v3.0. KE-4 in review. Sprint at 37%. Go fast-path delegation shipped (PRs #1000, #1001) as precursor to full Go kernel.

activePhases.name: v3.0 Major Release
activePhases.blockedBy: KE-2 (ActionContext) must ship before v3.0 item 1 can be checked

plannedPhases.note: Depends on v3.0 release + Cloud Phase 2A

milestones.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
milestones.significance: Phase 6 completion transforms AgentGuard from advisory interception to mandatory execution control. Default-deny is now the baseline. This unlocks KE-2 and v3.0 work.

milestones.name: Governance Event Envelope
milestones.significance: All telemetry now follows versioned schema. Cloud ingestion consumes envelopes directly with zero special cases.

milestones.name: Studio Runtime
milestones.significance: Studio wizard, execution profiles, and swarm template schema shipped ahead of schedule in v2.7.x (PR #987). Removes this dependency from v3.1 timeline. Runner is now the sole v3.1 item.
Added Codex CLI and Gemini CLI adapters. AgentGuard now governs 4 CLI agents: Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI.

backlogExpansionRate.note: 50 open issues at triage. ~15 actionable work items. Key triaged: #1048 (install attribution — closed, shipped via PR #991), #1049 (JetBrains plugin — Phase 9), #1055 (DeepAgents adapter — Phase 9 new), #1047 (KE-6 — already tracked), #1048 closed as duplicate of PR #991.

warningPhases.note: KE-2 (ActionContext, #856) in-progress since 2026-03-25 with 0/4 checkboxes. Critical path for v3.0. Monitor closely.

ciOnMain.note: Main branch CI green at HEAD ae37b15.

agentLiveness.note: Multiple agent branches active as of 2026-03-27. Swarm producing work.

roadmapProgress.note: Phase 6.75 completed (10 total). v2.8.0 released. Critical path: KE-2 -> v3.0.

All 6 health dimensions green. Mode confirmed: normal. No remediation required.

Issue #1048 closed (shipped via PR #991).

blockers.description: KE-2 (ActionContext, #856) is the critical path blocker for v3.0. Currently in-progress with 0/4 checkboxes.
blockers.recommendation: Prioritize KE-2 implementation. Single most important work item.

blockers.description: 3 security issues without assigned PRs: #618 (credential write bypass), #640 (path manipulation), #639 (credential stripping). #648 resolved via PR #982.
Issue #868: Agent PRs merging with failing CI. Governance enforcement gap on main branch.

systemSummary.progressSinceLastRun: v2.8.0 released (Codex+Gemini CLI adapters). Phase 6.75 (Studio Runtime) DONE 3/3. Install attribution v3.0 item checked (1/8). Go kernel fast-path delegation shipped. #648 resolved. Security bypass count 8->6. Risk 10->8.

modeChangeConditions.toNormal: CURRENT STATE — risk score 8, 0 open PRs, no conflicts, main CI green.
modeChangeConditions.toElevated: Risk score exceeds 20, or PR queue grows above 5, or new critical security regression.
modeChangeConditions.toCritical: Main CI failure rate >30%, 2+ unresolved critical issues, or merge conflict cascade (3+ PRs).
